Implements the prototype for the ECMA SyntaxError built-in object in the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This C source code file is part of the implementation of the ECMAScript engine, specifically handling the built-in `SyntaxError` prototype object. It includes various headers related to ECMAScript memory allocation, built-in objects, type conversion, exception handling, garbage collection, and string operations, indicating its role in managing ECMAScript objects and errors. The file conditionally compiles the `SyntaxError` prototype functionalities based on the `CONFIG_DISABLE_ERROR_BUILTINS` preprocessor directive, allowing for the exclusion of error built-ins if configured. The inclusion of `ecma-builtin-internal-routines-template.inc.h` with specific macros suggests the use of a template-based approach to define internal routines for the `SyntaxError` prototype.
